{{Expand}}

{{Infobox spell
| name = Archmage-level detection spells
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Archmage-level detection spells]] can be used to find agents.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5">''The Knight'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|"It also won’t find any agents that are shielded from Archmage-level detection spells, and there are mundane ways to hide from it."<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Spells]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
